query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gestor_tokens_recuperacao (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  token_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  gestor_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  expira_em BIGINT NOT NULL,
  usado BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  criado_em BIGINT,
  INDEX idx_token_hash (token_hash),
  INDEX idx_gestor_id (gestor_id)
)

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4BJigjDSHDXY3fo.aa7eee47dc1b --database eMtgZyuGJNKHLXS6iHiZyG --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gestor_tokens_recuperacao (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  token_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  gestor_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  expira_em BIGINT NOT NULL,
  usado BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  criado_em BIGINT,
  INDEX idx_token_hash (token_hash),
  INDEX idx_gestor_id (gestor_id)
